title: Organize Vacation Photos
drDigitalIntro:
Time to use everything you've learned about Photos!
• Favorite photos, create albums, edit, share, and clean up.
• You've done all of this before — now do it in one go.

playgroundTask.goal: You organized, edited, shared, and cleaned up your photo library

steps.say: Click the Beach Vacation photo to open it.
Now find the Orange Cat photo and open it.
Create a new album called Favorites Trip.
Add the Beach Vacation to your new album.
Open the Bird in Garden photo — it's too dark.
The photo is too dark. Drag the Brightness slider up.
Share a photo with Grandma. Open the Beach Vacation photo.
Share it with Grandma via Messages.
Delete the Budget Screenshot — it doesn't belong in your photos.
Oops — you need that! Go to Recently Deleted and recover it.

drDigitalSuccess: You did it all — favorited, organized into albums, edited, shared, deleted, and recovered. You're a Photos pro!
drDigitalHint: Follow each step — favorite photos, create an album, edit with the brightness slider, share via Messages, and use Recently Deleted to recover.
